fix_summary: The implementation correctly changes max_price filtering to an inclusive upper bound in search_flights and adds a focused regression test. Automated tests passed, confirming the fix and no adjacent regressions in the covered scope.
approval_reasons: The service-layer comparison was corrected from Flight.price >= max_price to Flight.price <= max_price, matching the issue requirement.
The added regression test validates that flights priced below and exactly at the threshold are returned, while higher-priced flights are excluded.
The route was left unchanged, which is consistent with the existing parameter plumbing and the minimal-fix constraint.
Automated tests passed (6/6), indicating the change is functioning as intended.
